title: sorghastrum balansae
intro: Sorghastrum balansae, also known as Indian grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the prairies of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Sorghastrum balansae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
